construction.panels: Standard set-in sleeve construction with a main body and two sleeves. An attached hood is present at the neckline.
construction.seams: Standard tonal stitching visible along panel lines, sleeve attachments, and hood seam. No contrast stitching.
construction.closures: Full-front snap button closure with seven black plastic snaps.
construction.details: Attached hood with a drawstring (drawstring not visible but implied by hood type). Ribbed cuffs at the sleeve openings and a ribbed hem band at the waist. Two front welt pockets are subtly visible near the hem.

graphics.content: A stylized rose graphic with intricate details, featuring a central rose bloom with surrounding leaves and abstract elements. The design incorporates dark outlines and lighter fill, creating depth.

branding.primary_logo: Stylized rose graphic, likely representing the SkyyRose brand or collection.
branding.secondary_marks: A small, rectangular woven label with purple and orange hues is visible inside the neck, likely a brand or size tag.

fabric_appearance: The main body and sleeves exhibit a smooth, lustrous satin finish. The hood and ribbed trim (cuffs, hem) appear to be a softer, matte fabric, possibly cotton fleece or a similar knit.
unique_features: The combination of a classic satin bomber jacket silhouette with an integrated, matte-finish hood. The detailed, raised rose embroidery adds a distinctive luxury touch.
collection_aesthetic: This piece aligns with the 'Oakland luxury streetwear' aesthetic of SkyyRose, featuring a dark, sophisticated color palette and a prominent, intricate rose graphic that embodies emotional expression and urban grit, fitting the 'black-rose' collection.
